appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md with gas price sourcing architecture (Spandex first, RPC fallback via src/gas-price.ts, cache keyed by chainId+blockNumber).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add src/gas-price.ts to the Architecture file map so future workers can discover the gas fallback and cache module quickly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature gas-price-rpc-fallback introduced src/gas-price.ts, but AGENTS.md architecture module list does not mention it.
